overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the character Geralt walking through the sunlit medieval city of Beauclair. The character descends grand stone stairs and winds through cobblestone streets past celebrating NPCs, historic stone buildings with terracotta roofs, and vibrant purple flowers, with panoramic views of the city and surrounding lake.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand stone staircase leading to courtyard

events.description: begins descending the wide stone stairs toward the courtyard below
reaches bottom of stairs and enters the open courtyard area

agents.ego_description: walking down grand stone stairs and entering a courtyard with scattered NPCs

notable_agents.action: group of armored guards standing near the courtyard entrance

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with worn steps descending alongside a yellow stone tower
tall cylindrical tower with crenellations and weathered yellow stone walls
lush purple flowering shrubs lining the left side of the stairs
ornate stone railing with decorative pillars along the stair edge
distant blue mountains under a partly cloudy sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt at the top of a grand stone staircase in a historic city, with a yellow stone tower to the right and purple flowers to the left. He descends the stairs, passing armored guards, and enters a sunlit cobblestone courtyard at the bottom.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper terrace with red columns overlooking the city

events.description: crowd of NPCs begins cheering and dancing as Geralt walks through the terrace
exits the courtyard onto an open terrace with panoramic views of the city and lake

agents.ego_description: walking through a celebrating crowd on an open terrace with expansive views

notable_agents.action: townsfolk dancing and cheering with arms raised in celebration
woman in red dress gesturing toward the crowd

entered.detail: open stone-paved terrace with decorative balustrades
tall cylindrical columns of red and white marble lining the path
sweeping vista of the terracotta-roofed city cascading down the hillside
blue lake visible in the distance beyond the city

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a lively terrace area where NPCs are celebrating and dancing. The scene opens up to reveal breathtaking panoramic views of the terracotta-roofed city and a distant blue lake, with tall red marble columns lining the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding cobblestone street between historic stone buildings

events.description: enters narrower winding streets between tall stone buildings with reduced sky visibility
descends a short flight of stone steps between closely packed buildings

agents.ego_description: navigating winding cobblestone paths and stairs through narrow medieval streets

notable_agents.action: elderly woman in traditional dress sitting by a wooden market stall

entered.detail: medieval stone tower with conical roof rising between buildings
rustic wooden roof structure extending over a shop entrance
vibrant blue painted door with stone arch surround
dense clusters of purple flowers in planters along the path

segments.scene_description: The path narrows as Geralt enters a winding medieval street flanked by tall stone buildings. He passes a stone tower and descends steps between closely packed houses with colorful doorways and flower boxes, while the lake remains visible to the right through gaps in the architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower city path approaching the waterfront

events.description: emerges from narrow streets to wider path with clearer view of the harbor and lake

agents.ego_description: continuing descent toward the lower city with the waterfront visible ahead

entered.detail: vibrant red plastered building with terracotta roof tiles
distant view of the harbor and waterfront buildings

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges onto a wider cobblestone path in the lower city, with a red plastered building on the left and expanding views of the harbor and lake to the right. The character continues descending toward the waterfront area as the video concludes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt descends from a grand historic height into the bustling lower districts of a sunlit medieval city. It begins at the top of a grand stone staircase flanked by a yellow tower and purple flowers, moving downward past armored guards into a bright cobblestone courtyard. As the path opens into a lively terrace filled with dancing NPCs, the view expands to reveal red marble columns and a breathtaking panorama of terracotta roofs and a distant blue lake. The scene then shifts into a narrower, winding street where the camera follows Geralt past closely packed houses and flower boxes, keeping the lake visible through gaps in the architecture. Finally, the path widens again past a red plastered building, leading the character further down toward the harbor and the waterfront.
